updates.tweet_text: @saltyairlife There is definitely a large bull flag there. I never assume any type of downside in ES though, I am always bullish in an uptrend (in an uptrend you should be a permabull and never even think of downside). If it fails we would see an elevator down sell though
updates.notes: Conversational reply about bull flag pattern and trend bias; no specific actionable price level named.

updates.tweet_text: @MizuTraderr High volatility means more setups, but if you don't know what your doing it can also means more losses. Markets like this are just easy as long as you don't overtrade and wait for the elevator down sells
